'''Vertigo Squad''' or '''Vertigo Company''' was a division of the [[True Mandalorians]] during the [[Mandalorian Civil War (True Mandalorians)|Mandalorian Civil War]]. They were composed of [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] with flight experience, and formed an air-attack unit. In the [[Battle of Korda Six]], they were led by [[Montross (bounty hunter)|Montross]].

==Appearances==
*[[Jango Fett: Open Seasons 2|''Jango Fett: Open Seasons'' 2]] {{Flash}}
